narrative: U.S. CPI risk and stalled Iran nuclear talks drive a cautious bid into the dollar as USD/JPY tests the 160.19 intervention threshold. USD leads G10 (+0.67% avg) while AUD lags (-0.64% avg) on a 1.32% spread; Fed 3.75% vs BoJ 0.75% carry (+300bp) anchors the USD/JPY bid despite moderate options put skew (25d RR -1.14). Gold lower -0.11%; equities +0.30%; DXY -0.08%; VIX 18.9. Watch BoC Rate Decision at 14:00 UTC and Governor Macklem's press conference at 14:30 UTC.
